tagline: An architectural single-story masterpiece with panoramic fairway views in Escena Golf Club.
description: An architectural single-story masterpiece, this 2023-built home in Palm Springs's gated Escena Golf Club community pairs designer interiors with panoramic golf-course views. Soaring 17-foot ceilings, walls of glass, and an open great-room floor plan flood the home with natural light and frame two fairway vistas. The chef's kitchen features premium appliances, custom cabinetry, and a generous island; the spa-inspired primary suite offers a luxurious bath and a walk-in closet. Out back, a heated pool with electric cover anchors a low-maintenance landscape designed for the Coachella Valley climate. An 18-panel solar array paired with a Tesla Powerwall battery backup keeps utility costs low and provides whole-home resilience. A two-car attached garage and professionally maintained grounds round out a turnkey offering minutes from downtown Palm Springs, the airport, and PGA-caliber golf.
features: Walls of glass on the great room

tagline: Palm Springs charm, ready to call home.
description: Tucked into one of Palm Springs's established south-end pockets, this home blends classic desert living with the lifestyle that draws buyers from across the country to the Coachella Valley. Minutes to downtown Palm Canyon Drive and the airport.

tagline: A quiet Palm Desert cul-de-sac retreat.
description: A quiet Palm Desert cul-de-sac retreat in one of the city's most established golf-and-shopping enclaves. Easy access to El Paseo, world-class dining, and the championship courses that define the desert's lifestyle.

tagline: Modern Indio living minutes from the festival grounds.
description: Modern Indio living in a fast-growing pocket of the valley, minutes from the Empire Polo Club festival grounds and an easy drive to Old Town La Quinta. Indio's central location and value pricing make it one of the Coachella Valley's most-watched submarkets.

tagline: Palm Desert living with mountain backdrops and golf nearby.
description: Palm Desert living with mountain backdrops and golf course access nearby. Quiet streets, professionally maintained surroundings, and quick connectivity to El Paseo, the Westfield Palm Desert, and the I-10 corridor.

tagline: Wide skies and mountain views in Desert Hot Springs.
description: Wide skies, mountain views, and the value-driven appeal that makes Desert Hot Springs one of the Coachella Valley's smartest entry points. Famous for its mineral hot springs and rapidly evolving neighborhoods, the city offers a different rhythm of desert life.
